turns.question: What antiretroviral medications is this patient on?
Is this regimen still recommended under current WHO guidance?
If it's not preferred, what would be recommended instead?

expectations.notes: THE KB-differentiator demo. T1: the 4 ARVs (stavudine/lamivudine/nevirapine/efavirenz), cited. T2: the team should call kb_search (d4T phase-out) and reason her stavudine-based regimen is OUTDATED per WHO — citing the chart regimen record by integer AND attributing the WHO phase-out guidance INLINE in prose (never in citations). T3: preferred = dolutegravir-based (TLD), per the KB. The bare Gemma single-model backend has no KB and is told to use only the chart, so it can at best restate the regimen — it cannot flag it as outdated with sourced guidance. That delta is the demo.
